title: Update on some recent activity in the Community Rankings

body.text:
I noticed some suspicious voting activity from a batch of throwaway accounts that were attempting to unfairly manipulate the community rankings.

I’ve removed those votes and recalculated the affected ratings, so everything should be back to normal.

I also added a couple of basic protections to make this kind of thing harder going forward.

If you notice anything weird again, feel free to let me know.
